description_long: This chaise features a modern, geometric design with sharply angled backrests on both ends, creating a symmetrical and visually striking silhouette. The entire structure is clad in a wood-textured finish, giving it a warm, natural appearance suitable for urban parks or public spaces. The seat is broad and flat, divided into two sections by a subtle seam at the center, suggesting a modular or dual-user configuration. The backrests rise at an angle from each end, providing ergonomic support while maintaining a minimalist aesthetic. There are no visible legs, armrests, or additional decorative elements, emphasizing a monolithic, sculptural form. The surface appears hard and smooth, with a matte finish that highlights the wood grain pattern.
description: A modern, angular chaise with wood-textured surfaces, dual sloped backrests, and a broad, flat seat divided at the center. Its minimalist, monolithic form is both functional and visually striking.
description_view_0: From this side view, the chaise's dual angled backrests and the central seam dividing the seat are clearly visible, emphasizing its geometric symmetry.
description_view_1: This end view highlights one of the sloped backrests and the full width of the seat, showing the depth and height of the backrest relative to the base.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors view 0, again showing the two angled backrests and the central seat division, reinforcing the chaise's symmetrical design.
description_view_3: This end view is similar to view 1 but from the opposite end, displaying the other backrest and the seat's width and depth.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest consists of two sharply angled, flat panels at each end of the chaise, rising from the seat at a steep incline. There is no visible curvature or segmentation, and the design is minimalist with no decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side; the chaise features only angled backrests at both ends.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs are present; the chaise has a solid, continuous base that extends to the ground, giving it a block-like, monolithic appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The surface displays a consistent wood grain texture with no visible fabric, pattern, tufting, or quilting. The finish is smooth and matte.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no visible cushions; the seat and backrests are integrated into the solid structure, with a single seam dividing the seat into two sections.
